title: Easy Smithing Template 👀
description: Craft Any Smithing Template in The Stonecutter!
body:
![get started](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dde59cde465d9193888264b72187793579e6fe92.png)
**Easy Smithing Template** makes upgrading and customizing gear much easier! With this mod, you can place the Empty Smithing Template into a stonecutter and craft it into any Smithing Template you need — from Netherite Upgrades to all Armor Trims. No more endless hunting, just simple and convenient crafting!
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bcdc8d19d47fdf5d48f234e98c29c56e76e4a8c.png)
![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f3d76d8ee855dc8ff23ac615c14def2552ac889.png)

Craft the ( **empty smithing template** ) and place it in the stonecutter to start crafting!

![any template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70943c7bab3e0cb87266303d0ead512df263c8bd.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bcdc8d19d47fdf5d48f234e98c29c56e76e4a8c.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
